biography.content: Dr. Ruslan Isaev discovered his fascination with computers and engineering at the age of seven, drawn to understanding how things work and creating intelligent systems. He earned his Specialist degree in Computer Science Education from Bashkir State Pedagogical University in 2006 and defended his PhD in Theoretical Physics (Astrophysics/Dark Matter) at Chelyabinsk State University in 2012. From 2005 to 2016, he taught in schools, shaping early generations of learners, and later served for three years at his alma mater as a Senior Lecturer and Drone & Robotics Lab Engineer. As Dean of the Faculty of Engineering and Informatics at Ala-Too International University, he led impactful reforms, expanded industry partnerships, achieved international accreditations, and redefined final theses into startups, patents, and publications. Currently, he serves as Associate Dean at Paragon International University in Phnom Penh, Cambodia. His research spans AI, VR, Robotics, UAVs, and NLP. Guided by the belief to “think globally, act locally,” he inspires young scientists to pursue innovation with persistence and purpose.
